targetSequence.desc: CLK=0, Din=1: Initial state [0,0]. Data ready.
CLK↑, Din=1: Shift in 1 → Q0=1, Q1=0
CLK↑, Din=0: Shift in 0 → Q0=0, Q1=Q0_old=1

hint: A shift register is just D flip-flops in series! Connect Din → DFF₁.D, DFF₁.Q → DFF₂.D. Both share the same clock. Data 'shifts' one position each clock edge. UART, SPI, and USB all use this principle.
title: 2-Bit Shift Register (SIPO)
objective: Build a Serial-In Parallel-Out shift register
description: Shift registers are the backbone of serial communication (UART, SPI, USB). Build a 2-bit SIPO (Serial-In, Parallel-Out) shift register: on each clock edge, data shifts from Din into Q₀, and Q₀'s old value shifts into Q₁.
